scripts.test:rust:litesvm: yarn prep:program-keys && anchor build && cargo test --workspace --features litesvm-integration -- --nocapture
scripts.prep:program-keys: mkdir -p target/deploy && cp deploy/brokex_core-keypair.json deploy/brokex_vault-keypair.json target/deploy/
scripts.test:anchor: yarn prep:program-keys && anchor build && anchor test --skip-build --validator legacy
scripts.test:lifecycle: yarn prep:program-keys && anchor build -- --features mock-oracle && anchor test --skip-build --validator legacy tests/brokex-core-lifecycle.ts
